languages.original_text: "So your refusal is categorical? How regrettable! The complementarity of your personality with your current post carries an inconceivably positive coefficient approaching one hundred percent. Maintaining this rate is a matter pleasing to the Omnissiah."

languages.text: "То есть ваш отказ ультимативен? Прискорбно! Комплементарность вашей личности с занимаемой должностью имеет немыслимый коэффициент полезного действия, близкий к ста процентам. Поддерживать сей показатель есть дело, угодное Омниссии".

"So your refusal is categorical? How regrettable! The complementarity of your personality with your current post carries an inconceivably positive coefficient approaching one hundred percent. Maintaining this rate is a matter pleasing to the Omnissiah."

"So your refusal is categorical? How regrettable! The complementarity of your personality with your current post carries an inconceivably positive coefficient approaching one hundred percent. Maintaining this rate is a matter pleasing to the Omnissiah."

languages.text: «¿Su negativa es categórica, entonces? ¡Qué lástima! La compatibilidad de su personalidad con su puesto actual presenta un coeficiente inimaginablemente positivo de casi el cien por cien. Mantener estos valores es algo que complacería al Omnissiah».
languages.original_text: "So your refusal is categorical? How regrettable! The complementarity of your personality with your current post carries an inconceivably positive coefficient approaching one hundred percent. Maintaining this rate is a matter pleasing to the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: «¿Su negativa es categórica, entonces? ¡Qué lástima! La compatibilidad de su personalidad con su puesto actual presenta un coeficiente inimaginablemente positivo de casi el cien por cien. Mantener estos valores es algo que complacería al Omnissiah».

languages.text: 「では、あなたの拒絶は断固たるものなのですね？ なんと残念な！ あなたの人格と現在の職務との相補性は、百パーセントに迫る、考えられぬほど良好な係数を示しています。この比率を維持することは、オムニッシアの御心にかなう事柄なのです」
languages.original_text: "So your refusal is categorical? How regrettable! The complementarity of your personality with your current post carries an inconceivably positive coefficient approaching one hundred percent. Maintaining this rate is a matter pleasing to the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: 「では、あなたの拒絶は断固たるものなのですね？ なんと残念な！ あなたの人格と現在の職務との相補性は、百パーセントに迫る、考えられぬほど良好な係数を示しています。この比率を維持することは、オムニッシアの御心にかなう事柄なのです」

languages.text: “所以你坚决不肯？太遗憾了！你的人格与你现有职位的向性携带着一个难以想象的、接近百分之百的正向系数。维持这个比率将会令欧姆尼赛亚感到愉悦。”
languages.original_text: "So your refusal is categorical? How regrettable! The complementarity of your personality with your current post carries an inconceivably positive coefficient approaching one hundred percent. Maintaining this rate is a matter pleasing to the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: “所以你坚决不肯？太遗憾了！你的人格与你现有职位的向性携带着一个难以想象的、接近百分之百的正向系数。维持这个比率将会令欧姆尼赛亚感到愉悦。”

languages.text: "Ihr weigert Euch also kategorisch? Wie bedauerlich! Die Komplementarität Eurer Persönlichkeit mit Eurer derzeitigen Position birgt einen ausgesprochen positiven Koeffizienten, der bei nahezu hundert Prozent liegt. Die Wahrung dieses Werte würde den Omnissiah erfreuen."
languages.original_text: "So your refusal is categorical? How regrettable! The complementarity of your personality with your current post carries an inconceivably positive coefficient approaching one hundred percent. Maintaining this rate is a matter pleasing to the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr weigert Euch also kategorisch? Wie bedauerlich! Die Komplementarität Eurer Persönlichkeit mit Eurer derzeitigen Position birgt einen ausgesprochen positiven Koeffizienten, der bei nahezu hundert Prozent liegt. Die Wahrung dieses Werte würde den Omnissiah erfreuen."

languages.text: « Alors, vous refusez catégoriquement ? C'est regrettable ! La complémentarité entre votre personnalité et votre poste actuel correspond à un coefficient incroyablement positif qui avoisine les cent pour cent. Maintenir ce taux ferait la joie de l'Omnimessie. »
languages.original_text: "So your refusal is categorical? How regrettable! The complementarity of your personality with your current post carries an inconceivably positive coefficient approaching one hundred percent. Maintaining this rate is a matter pleasing to the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: « Alors, vous refusez catégoriquement ? C'est regrettable ! La complémentarité entre votre personnalité et votre poste actuel correspond à un coefficient incroyablement positif qui avoisine les cent pour cent. Maintenir ce taux ferait la joie de l'Omnimessie. »

languages.text: "Yani reddiniz kesin mi? Ne kadar üzücü! Kişiliğinizin mevcut görevinizle tamamlayıcılığı; yüzde yüze yaklaşan, akıl almaz derecede olumlu bir katsayı taşıyor. Bu oranı korumak, Hermesih'i memnun edecek bir meseledir."
languages.original_text: "So your refusal is categorical? How regrettable! The complementarity of your personality with your current post carries an inconceivably positive coefficient approaching one hundred percent. Maintaining this rate is a matter pleasing to the Omnissiah."
